qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which actor entities having at least one related characters record (linked on actor.actorid = characters.actorid), whose characters record itself has at least one related movie record (linked on characters.movieid = movie.movieid) with gross equal to '197011982.0' and runtime equal to '84' and title equal to 'Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over'?
